column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Login Page
3.leave email & phone fields empty
4.Click on the Login button
column6: Error message should be displayed for required fields (e.g., “Email/Mobile is required”)
column7: System displayed error message for empty fields

column4: Validate login with already registered email
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Login Page
3.Enter an existing email address into the email field
4.Click on the Login button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Email is already registered"

column4: Validate login with existing mobile number
column5:
1.open the Flipkart application
2.Nagivate to the Login  page
3.Enter the registered phone number into the mobile number field
4.Click on the Login button
column6:
Error messages should be displayed for:
"Mobile Number already registered"

column4: Validate login with unregistered email address
column5:
1.open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Login  page
3.Enter an unregister email address into the Email field
4.Click on the Login button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Email address not found"

column4: Validate login wtih empty OTP field
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the login Page
3.Enter the valid Email & mobile number into the field
4.Navigate to the OTP page
5.Leave OTP field empty
6.Click on Login button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Please enter  OTP"

column4: Validate login with invaild OTP  field
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the login Page
3.Enter the valid Email & mobile number into the field
4.Navigate to the OTP page
5.Enter invalid OTP into the OTP field
6.Click on Login button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Invalid OTP, please try again"

column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the login Page
3.Enter the valid  mobile number into the field
4.Navigate to the OTP page
5.Enter the expired OTP into the OTP field
6.Click on Login button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "OTP expired"
column7: System displayed “OTP expired” and login failed

column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the login Page
3.Enter the valid  mobile number into the field
4.Navigate to the OTP page
5.Enter the valid OTP into the OTP field

column6: User should be logged in successfully
